codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the requested user-notes scope: user-scoped note CRUD endpoints with required note text validation, session-derived noteAddedBy, important-first ordering, and edit-page modal UI for add/edit/delete with important notes highlighted at the top.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill procedure requires UI component tests, but this feature shipped UI changes without client test additions while still marking followedProcedure=true. The skill guidance appears stricter than actual accepted workflow.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md (Step 6: 'Write UI component tests'). Commit fbf0ac5 --stat changed app/apps/client/src/pages/AdminUserFormPage.tsx, app/apps/server/src/routes/users.ts, and app/apps/server/src/__tests__/users.test.ts only; handoff.tests.added lists only server tests.

summary: PASS: user-notes satisfies described and expected behavior with no blocking defects found; one skill-procedure mismatch was recorded for shared-state triage.
